prompt: A restocking AMR refills shelves while a drone verifies stock levels. The drone can only scan shelves when the AMR is idle. Both must stop if any obstacle is detected within 1 meters.
constraints: StockDrone scans only when RestockAMR is idle
Amr must stop if any obstacle is detected within 1 meters
Drone must stop if any obstacle is detected within 1 meters
